message:
Add cross-platform build system with single-binary compilation

Implement a custom build system using Bun's compile feature to produce
standalone executables that can be distributed without requiring users
to have Bun or Node.js installed.

Key changes:
- Add scripts/build.ts: Custom build script that uses Bun.build() API
  with a plugin to stub out react-devtools-core, which is an optional
  Ink dependency that causes runtime errors when bundled. The script
  first creates a bundle with the stub, then compiles it to a binary.

- Add scripts/react-devtools-stub.js: Empty stub module that replaces
  react-devtools-core during bundling, preventing "module not found"
  errors at runtime while maintaining full functionality (devtools are
  only used when DEV=true environment variable is set).

- Update package.json with comprehensive build scripts:
  * build: Default build for current platform
  * build:mac-arm64, build:mac-x64: macOS builds
  * build:linux-x64, build:linux-arm64: Linux builds
  * build:windows-x64: Windows build
  * build:all: Build all platform variants

- Add bin entry pointing to dist/phage-explorer for npm publishing
- Add project description and license field (MIT)
- Add ESLint and typescript-eslint dev dependencies for code quality
- Add lint, check, test, and test:integration scripts

The build produces a ~58MB self-contained executable that bundles
the entire application including all React/Ink components, the
SQLite runtime, and phage 3D models.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,19 +1,36 @@
 {
   "name": "phage-explorer",
   "version": "1.0.0",
-  "private": true,
+  "description": "Terminal UI for browsing, visualizing, and analyzing bacteriophage genetic data with color-coded sequences and 3D ASCII models.",
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "bin": {
+    "phage-explorer": "./dist/phage-explorer"
+  },
+  "type": "module",
   "workspaces": [
     "packages/*"
   ],
   "scripts": {
     "dev": "bun run packages/tui/src/index.tsx",
     "build:db": "bun run packages/data-pipeline/src/build-db.ts",
-    "ingest": "bun run packages/data-pipeline/src/ingest.ts",
-    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
+    "build": "bun run scripts/build.ts",
+    "build:mac-arm64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=mac-arm64",
+    "build:mac-x64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=mac-x64",
+    "build:linux-x64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=linux-x64",
+    "build:linux-arm64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=linux-arm64",
+    "build:windows-x64": "bun run scripts/build.ts --target=windows-x64",
+    "build:all": "bun run build:mac-arm64 && bun run build:mac-x64 && bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64 && bun run build:windows-x64",
+    "lint": "bunx eslint packages --max-warnings=0",
+    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
+    "check": "bun run lint && bun run typecheck",
+    "test": "bun test",
+    "test:integration": "PHAGE_INTEGRATION=1 bun test --filter integration"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@types/bun": "^1.1.14",
     "@types/react": "^18.3.12",
+    "eslint": "^9.15.0",
+    "typescript-eslint": "^8.14.0",
     "typescript": "^5.7.2"
   }
 }
